evals.prompt: what do I have due in my Skill Test list?
evals.expected_output: A rounded-corner Unicode table showing all 5 reminders from the Skill Test list, grouped and sorted by due date, with the overdue item visible

evals.prompt: add a reminder to pick up the cake on March 19th to my Skill Test list, high priority
evals.expected_output: Runs remindctl add with --list 'Skill Test' --due 2026-03-19 --priority high --json, then confirms with inline format

evals.prompt: mark the dry cleaning reminder as done in my Skill Test list
evals.expected_output: First runs show open to find the ID for 'Pick up dry cleaning', then runs remindctl complete with that ID prefix, confirms completion
